requirement_topic.en: Pressure Equipment Directive — Pressure Vessels and Piping
requirement_topic.zh: 压力设备指令 — 压力容器及管道
requirement_topic.zht: 壓力設備指令 — 壓力容器及管道

summary.en: Electrolyzer pressure vessels and associated piping above the thresholds in PED 2014/68/EU (Article 4) must bear CE marking and comply with the Directive. Conformity assessment follows risk-based categories (I–IV): higher-risk equipment (Category III/IV) requires a Notified Body under modules such as B+D (Type Examination plus Quality Assurance of Production) or equivalent. Harmonised standards include EN 13445 (unfired pressure vessels) and EN 13480 (metallic industrial piping). The manufacturer must compile a Technical File and issue an EU Declaration of Conformity.
summary.zh: 依照《压力设备指令》2014/68/EU（第4条），超过阈值的电解槽压力容器及相关管道必须加贴CE标志并符合该指令。合格评定按风险类别（I–IV）划分：高风险设备（III/IV类）须通过公告机构，采用B+D模块（型式检验+生产质量保证）或同等方式。协调标准包括EN 13445（非直火压力容器）和EN 13480（金属工业管道）。制造商须建立技术文档并出具欧盟合格声明。
summary.zht: 依照《壓力設備指令》2014/68/EU（第4條），超過閾值的電解槽壓力容器及相關管道必須加貼CE標誌並符合該指令。合格評定按風險類別（I–IV）劃分：高風險設備（III/IV類）須通過公告機構，採用B+D模組（型式檢驗+生產品質保證）或同等方式。協調標準包括EN 13445（非直火壓力容器）和EN 13480（金屬工業管道）。製造商須建立技術文檔並出具歐盟合格聲明。

summary.en: In China, electrolyzer pressure vessels fall under the Special Equipment Safety Law (2013) and the TSG (特种设备安全技术规范) pressure-vessel regime administered by SAMR (formerly AQSIQ). Design and manufacture require registration and approval by provincial or national TSG authorities. The principal manufacturing standard is GB 150 (Steel Pressure Vessels). A TSG design approval certificate (设计文件鉴定) and manufacturing licence (制造许可证) are mandatory before production. Periodic inspection by a government-designated inspection body is also required.
summary.zh: 在中国，电解槽压力容器受《特种设备安全法》（2013年）及国家市场监督管理总局（原质检总局）管理的TSG特种设备安全技术规范约束。设计和制造须向省级或国家级TSG主管部门进行登记并获批。主要制造标准为GB 150（钢制压力容器）。生产前必须取得TSG设计文件鉴定证书和制造许可证，并须经政府指定检验机构定期检验。
summary.zht: 在中國，電解槽壓力容器受《特種設備安全法》（2013年）及國家市場監督管理總局（原質檢總局）管理的TSG特種設備安全技術規範約束。設計和製造須向省級或國家級TSG主管部門進行登記並獲批。主要製造標準為GB 150（鋼制壓力容器）。生產前必須取得TSG設計文件鑒定證書和製造許可證，並須經政府指定檢驗機構定期檢驗。

standards_or_laws: Special Equipment Safety Law of the PRC (2013)
TSG 21 (Supervision Regulation on Stationary Pressure Vessels)

gap.en: Chinese TSG pressure-vessel certificates and GB 150 compliance are not recognised under PED 2014/68/EU. To export to the EU, manufacturers must obtain CE marking under PED through an EU-authorised Notified Body — there is no mutual recognition agreement covering pressure equipment between China and the EU. This typically requires a new conformity assessment process (design review, production inspection) conducted against EN 13445 or equivalent harmonised standards, representing a significant additional compliance cost and lead time.
gap.zh: 中国TSG压力容器证书及GB 150合规不被欧盟《压力设备指令》2014/68/EU认可。出口欧盟须通过欧盟授权的公告机构取得PED CE标志——中欧之间不存在涵盖压力设备的相互认可协议。这通常需要依据EN 13445或同等协调标准重新开展合格评定（设计审查、生产检验），会带来较高的额外合规成本和周期。
gap.zht: 中國TSG壓力容器證書及GB 150合規不被歐盟《壓力設備指令》2014/68/EU認可。出口歐盟須通過歐盟授權的公告機構取得PED CE標誌——中歐之間不存在涵蓋壓力設備的相互認可協議。這通常需要依據EN 13445或同等協調標準重新開展合格評定（設計審查、生產檢驗），會帶來較高的額外合規成本和週期。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for pressure equipment above PED Article 4 thresholds placed on the EU market
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory under Chinese Special Equipment Safety Law for pressure vessels manufactured or operated in China

source.publisher: EUR-Lex / Official Journal of the European Union

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese electrolyzer manufacturers holding TSG/GB 150 certifications must additionally obtain CE marking under PED 2014/68/EU via an EU Notified Body before EU market entry. Existing Chinese pressure-vessel approvals do not substitute for PED conformity assessment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 持有TSG/GB 150证书的中国电解槽制造商在进入欧盟市场前，还须通过欧盟公告机构取得PED 2014/68/EU CE标志。现有中国压力容器批准文件不能替代PED合格评定。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 持有TSG/GB 150證書的中國電解槽製造商在進入歐盟市場前，還須通過歐盟公告機構取得PED 2014/68/EU CE標誌。現有中國壓力容器批准文件不能替代PED合格評定。

requirement_topic.en: Machinery Directive — Mechanical Safety of Electrolyzer Systems
requirement_topic.zh: 机械指令 — 电解槽系统机械安全
requirement_topic.zht: 機械指令 — 電解槽系統機械安全

summary.en: Electrolyzer systems constitute machinery under Directive 2006/42/EC (Machinery Directive) and must meet its Essential Health and Safety Requirements (EHSRs) before CE marking can be affixed. Key obligations include: risk assessment documented in the Technical File, safe design for pressure-related mechanical hazards (including hydrogen containment under pressure), compliance with relevant harmonised standards (e.g. EN ISO 22734 for hydrogen generators), and an EU Declaration of Conformity. Note: from 20 January 2027 Directive 2006/42/EC will be replaced by Regulation (EU) 2023/1230 (Machinery Regulation), which introduces stricter digital documentation requirements including mandatory digital instructions and cybersecurity obligations.
summary.zh: 电解槽系统属于《机械指令》2006/42/EC定义的机械，加贴CE标志前须满足其基本健康与安全要求（EHSR）。主要义务包括：在技术文档中记录风险评估、针对压力相关机械危险（含带压氢气密封）进行安全设计、符合相关协调标准（如EN ISO 22734氢气发生器标准），以及出具欧盟合格声明。注：自2027年1月20日起，2006/42/EC指令将被《机械法规》（EU）2023/1230取代，该法规引入更严格的数字化文档要求，包括强制性数字说明书及网络安全义务。
summary.zht: 電解槽系統屬於《機械指令》2006/42/EC定義的機械，加貼CE標誌前須滿足其基本健康與安全要求（EHSR）。主要義務包括：在技術文檔中記錄風險評估、針對壓力相關機械危險（含帶壓氫氣密封）進行安全設計、符合相關協調標準（如EN ISO 22734氫氣發生器標準），以及出具歐盟合格聲明。注：自2027年1月20日起，2006/42/EC指令將被《機械法規》（EU）2023/1230取代，該法規引入更嚴格的數字化文檔要求，包括強制性數字說明書及網絡安全義務。

standards_or_laws: EN ISO 22734:2019 (Hydrogen generators using water electrolysis — harmonised reference; superseded at ISO level by ISO 22734-1:2025, July 2025; EN ISO 22734-1:2025 not yet published in EU Official Journal as of mid-2026)

summary.en: China does not have a single machinery safety directive equivalent to 2006/42/EC. Electrolyzer mechanical safety is covered by a combination of: GB/T 37562 (safety requirements for pressure-type water electrolysis hydrogen production systems), the Special Equipment Safety Law for pressure-containing components, and sector-specific standards from the National Energy Administration (NEA). China Compulsory Certification (CCC) under the Certification and Accreditation Administration (CNCA) applies to certain categories of electrical machinery but does not directly map to the Machinery Directive's EHSR framework. Industrial water electrolyzers do not appear in the current CCC mandatory product catalogue (CNCA-22C-037); CCC scope does not extend to this product category based on CNCA announcements through 2025.
summary.zh: 中国没有与2006/42/EC完全对应的单一机械安全指令。电解槽机械安全由以下规范共同涵盖：GB/T 37562（压力型水电解制氢系统安全要求）、针对含压部件的《特种设备安全法》，以及国家能源局（NEA）的行业专项标准。中国强制认证（CCC）由认证认可监督管理委员会（CNCA）负责，适用于某些类别的电气机械，但与机械指令EHSR框架不直接对应。根据CNCA截至2025年的公告，工业水电解槽不在现行CCC强制认证产品目录（CNCA-22C-037）范围内。
summary.zht: 中國沒有與2006/42/EC完全對應的單一機械安全指令。電解槽機械安全由以下規範共同涵蓋：GB/T 37562（壓力型水電解製氫系統安全要求）、針對含壓部件的《特種設備安全法》，以及國家能源局（NEA）的行業專項標準。中國強制認證（CCC）由認證認可監督管理委員會（CNCA）負責，適用於某些類別的電氣機械，但與機械指令EHSR框架不直接對應。根據CNCA截至2025年的公告，工業水電解槽不在現行CCC強制認證產品目錄（CNCA-22C-037）範圍內。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37562 (Safety requirements for pressure-type water electrolysis hydrogen production systems)
Special Equipment Safety Law of the PRC (2013)
CCC (China Compulsory Certification, CNCA) — industrial water electrolyzers not in current mandatory catalogue per CNCA announcements through 2025

gap.en: Chinese mechanical safety approvals (GB/T 37562, CCC where applicable) are not accepted as equivalents to Machinery Directive 2006/42/EC CE conformity. EU market entry requires a full EHSR-based risk assessment, technical file, and Declaration of Conformity under the Directive. Self-declaration is possible for most electrolyzer configurations (no Notified Body mandatory under the Machinery Directive itself, unless combined with PED obligations), but the documentation burden is substantial and must reference EU harmonised standards rather than Chinese GB standards.
gap.zh: 中国机械安全批准（GB/T 37562、适用时的CCC）不被视为与《机械指令》2006/42/EC CE合规等同。进入欧盟市场须依据该指令完成基于EHSR的完整风险评估、技术文档及合格声明。大多数电解槽配置可进行自我声明（除非与PED义务叠加，机械指令本身通常不强制要求公告机构），但文档负担较重，且须引用欧盟协调标准而非中国GB标准。
gap.zht: 中國機械安全批准（GB/T 37562、適用時的CCC）不被視為與《機械指令》2006/42/EC CE合規等同。進入歐盟市場須依據該指令完成基於EHSR的完整風險評估、技術文檔及合格聲明。大多數電解槽配置可進行自我聲明（除非與PED義務疊加，機械指令本身通常不強制要求公告機構），但文檔負擔較重，且須引用歐盟協調標準而非中國GB標準。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for machinery placed on the EU/EEA market under Directive 2006/42/EC
mandatory_status.cn: Partially mandatory — GB/T 37562 is recommended/voluntary; industrial water electrolyzers not in current CCC mandatory catalogue per CNCA announcements through 2025

source.publisher: EUR-Lex / Official Journal of the European Union

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese electrolyzer manufacturers must conduct an independent EHSR risk assessment and produce EU-compliant technical documentation under Directive 2006/42/EC. Chinese GB/T 37562 or CCC approvals do not satisfy Machinery Directive requirements for EU market access.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国电解槽制造商须依据2006/42/EC指令独立开展EHSR风险评估，并出具符合欧盟要求的技术文档。中国GB/T 37562或CCC批准不满足进入欧盟市场的机械指令要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國電解槽製造商須依據2006/42/EC指令獨立開展EHSR風險評估，並出具符合歐盟要求的技術文檔。中國GB/T 37562或CCC批准不滿足進入歐盟市場的機械指令要求。
